0000000100000c48	str	x8, [sp, #0x10]

0000000100000c58	ldur	w8, [x29, #-0xc]

0000000100000c60	str	x8, [x9, #0x8]

_bench_mul_dep:
00000001000018cc	sub	sp, sp, #0x50
00000001000018d0	stp	x29, x30, [sp, #0x40]
00000001000018d4	add	x29, sp, #0x40

00000001000018dc	movk	x8, #0x7bb, lsl #16
00000001000018e0	movk	x8, #0x272e, lsl #32
00000001000018e4	movk	x8, #0x6c62, lsl #48
00000001000018e8	str	x8, [sp, #0x8]
00000001000018ec	stur	x0, [x29, #-0x8]

00000001000018fc	movk	x9, #0x9e37, lsl #48

_quantize_bfloat16_proxy:
